---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    highlight: tango
---

***

### 2019

Activity-Based Travel Demand Model

***

### 2018

[Travel Behavior Survey](http://www.trpa.org/wp-content/uploads/travel_survey_report.html)

Census Data

***

### 2017

[Bird Observations](https://rhaefer.github.io/bird.html)

[Ski Tours](https://rhaefer.github.io/ski_tours.html)

***

### 2016

[Transportation Funding](https://rhaefer.github.io/tableau.html)

***

### 2014

<a href="https://digital.lib.washington.edu/researchworks/handle/1773/26844" target="_blank">Assessing the relationship between city growth and electricity use over time: A comparative analysis of Chandigarh and Seattle</a>, University of Washington

<a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGc3JnTDRSazZJX0U/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Public Street and Area Lighting Inventory Phase 1: Survey Results</a>, Municipal Solid-State Street Lighting Consortium, Prepared for U.S. Department of Energy

<a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8T2r7MVXupGRXdTaFNxTDAxTE0/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank">Chandigarh Urban Lab, Solar-Spine</a>, University of Washington, 2014
